name: codex-autoresearch
description: Autonomous experiment loops for Codex: set up a benchmark, run iterations, log results, export dashboards, and finalize kept changes.

interface.shortDescription: Run autonomous benchmark loops and keep measured wins
interface.longDescription: Codex Autoresearch adapts pi-autoresearch for Codex. It provides skills and local MCP/CLI helpers for setting up autoresearch.md and benchmark scripts, running timed experiments that parse METRIC lines, logging keep/discard/crash results to autoresearch.jsonl, exporting a static dashboard, and splitting kept experiments into clean review branches.
defaultPrompt: Start autoresearch for this project. Ask only for the missing benchmark, metric, direction, scope, and checks, then take a baseline.
Run an autoresearch doctor check before the next experiment.
Run /autoresearch next to produce one preflight, benchmark, decision, and ASI packet.
Run the next autoresearch iteration and log the result with ASI.
Use deep-research-orchestration to Study my project, identify delightful high-impact changes, convert the findings into a quality_gap benchmark, and iterate until the gaps are closed.
Export the autoresearch dashboard and summarize baseline, best metric, kept runs, and confidence.
Draft finalization groups from autoresearch history, then review before creating branches.
Finalize this autoresearch branch into clean review branches from the kept experiments.
